name: securecrt-sessions
title: SecureCRT Sessions
description: Open saved SecureCRT sessions from Raycast
author: leec-666

preferences.name: securecrtConfigPath
preferences.title: SecureCRT Config Path
preferences.description: Path to the SecureCRT Config folder. Use auto to read SecureCRT's configured path.

preferences.name: securecrtExecutablePath
preferences.title: SecureCRT App Path
preferences.description: Path to the SecureCRT app or executable

preferences.name: showHostnames
preferences.title: Show Hostnames and Protocols
preferences.label: Show hostnames and protocols
preferences.description: Read session files while loading to show hostnames and protocols in the list

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
